title: Spicy Russian Cabbage Stir Fry
description: A spicy and savory stir fry dish featuring cabbage, onions, and a hint of Russian flavors.
instructions: Heat 1 tablespoon of vegetable oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add sliced onions and cook until translucent, about 3-4 minutes.
Add thinly sliced cabbage and cook until slightly tender, about 4-5 minutes.
Stir in spicy stir fry sauce and cook for an additional 1-2 minutes.
Crumbles Russian cheese on top of the cabbage mixture and remove from heat.
Let it sit for 1-2 minutes to allow cheese to melt and mixture to set.
